summary: P1 (DeepSeek LLM Provider), P2 (Portal Finance), P3 (Contract OS Enhancement) testing completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly. LLM endpoints using Emergent GPT fallback (DEEPSEEK_API_KEY not set - expected behavior). Customer Portal Finance tab shows summary stats, invoice list with status colors, payment info, bank transfer details. Contract detail shows version info, legal modules, digital signature options.

issues: CORS warning for ipapi.co/json - non-critical, external service

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ P1 LLM Provider: GET /api/admin/llm/status returns provider info (active_provider=emergent_gpt_fallback), migration status, metrics
✅ P1 LLM Provider: GET /api/admin/llm/health returns live health check (status=healthy, provider=emergent_gpt_fallback)
✅ P1 LLM Provider: POST /api/admin/llm/test works with default and custom prompts
✅ P1 LLM Provider: POST /api/admin/llm/test-agent-flow tests session continuity with initial + followup responses
✅ P2 Finance: GET /api/customer/finance returns summary (total_invoices, outstanding, paid), invoices with payment_status/severity/reminder_level, bank_transfer_info
✅ P2 Finance: Frontend Finance tab shows 4 stat cards (Rechnungen, Offen, Bezahlt, Ausstehend)
✅ P2 Finance: Invoice cards show status badges with colors (Bezahlt=green), amounts (Netto/USt/Brutto), dates, Mahnstufe
✅ P3 Contract: GET /api/customer/contracts/{id} returns versions array, evidence_trail array, has_pdf, pdf_url
✅ P3 Contract: Frontend shows VERSION: v1 in contract header
✅ P3 Contract: Digital signature section with Zeichnen/Name eingeben options, document hash displayed
✅ P3 Contract: Action buttons for Vertrag annehmen, Änderung anfragen, Ablehnen
✅ Auth: Customer portal access via magic link (portal-access → verify-token → JWT) working correctly

test_credentials.customer_portal: Magic link auth via /api/admin/customers/portal-access (test customer: max@testfirma.de)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1/P2/P3 features fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/llm/status (provider info), GET /api/admin/llm/health (live health check), POST /api/admin/llm/test (LLM test), POST /api/admin/llm/test-agent-flow (agent flow with session). GET /api/customer/finance (full finance data with invoices, quotes, contracts, bank info). GET /api/customer/contracts/{id} (enhanced with versions, evidence_trail, signature_preview, has_pdf). Customer auth flow: POST /api/admin/customers/portal-access → extract magic token from portal_url → POST /api/auth/verify-token → get JWT. DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is not set, so LLM uses Emergent GPT fallback (expected behavior).

p1_llm_provider.status_endpoint: ✅ GET /api/admin/llm/status returns active_provider, is_target_architecture, providers, migration_ready, metrics
p1_llm_provider.test_endpoint: ✅ POST /api/admin/llm/test works with default and custom prompts
p1_llm_provider.fallback_behavior: ✅ Using Emergent GPT fallback since DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is not set

p2_customer_finance.finance_endpoint: ✅ GET /api/customer/finance returns summary, invoices, quotes, contracts, bank_transfer_info
p2_customer_finance.invoice_structure: ✅ Invoices have payment_status, payment_status_label, payment_status_severity, amounts, dates, reminder_level
p2_customer_finance.bank_info: ✅ Bank transfer info includes IBAN, BIC, bank_name, account_holder
p2_customer_finance.frontend_summary: ✅ Finance tab shows 4 stat cards (Rechnungen, Offen, Bezahlt, Ausstehend)
p2_customer_finance.frontend_invoices: ✅ Invoice cards show status badges, amounts, dates, Mahnstufe

p3_contract_os_enhancement.has_pdf: ✅ Contract detail returns has_pdf and pdf_url
p3_contract_os_enhancement.frontend_version: ✅ Shows VERSION: v1 in contract header
p3_contract_os_enhancement.frontend_signature: ✅ Digital signature section with Zeichnen/Name eingeben options

mocked_apis.DeepSeek LLM API: Falls back to Emergent GPT since DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is empty (expected behavior)
